summary: Comprehensive testing of FitMaxPro completed. All 20 backend API tests passed. Frontend verified: Login, Reviews, My Progress (with evolution charts), and Admin Panel with all tabs (Dashboard, Reviews, Social Media, Warm-Up/Stretching, Coaching, Before/After Photos). All requested features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Email/password login works
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - Returns user data with VIP tier
Backend: GET /api/workouts?program_type=abs&language=fr - Returns 3 abs workouts (FR)
Backend: GET /api/workouts?program_type=abs&language=en - Returns 3 abs workouts (EN)
Backend: GET /api/routines/warmup?language=fr - Returns 8 exercises with valid YouTube video_urls
Backend: GET /api/reviews - Returns reviews list
Backend: POST /api/reviews - Creates new review (authenticated)
Backend: GET /api/social-links - Returns social links
Backend: PUT /api/admin/social-links - Updates social links successfully
Backend: GET /api/admin/reviews - Returns all reviews for admin
Backend: GET /api/admin/routines - Returns 4 routines (warmup_fr, warmup_en, stretching_fr, stretching_en)
Backend: POST /api/admin/send-inactivity-alerts - Sends alerts successfully
Backend: GET /api/user/evolution - Returns user progress stats
Backend: GET /api/admin/all-subscribers-evolution - Returns subscribers list
Backend: GET /api/admin/progress-photos - Returns users progress photos
Frontend: Login page with email/password works correctly
Frontend: Reviews page - Leave review form works
Frontend: My Progress page - Shows evolution charts with tabs (Overview, Charts, History)
Frontend: Admin Panel Dashboard - Shows stats (108 workouts, 10 users, 2 VIP)
Frontend: Admin Reviews tab - Shows reviews with reply/delete options
Frontend: Admin Social Media tab - Shows social links management form
Frontend: Admin Warm-Up/Stretching tab - Shows 4 routines with exercises
Frontend: Admin Coaching tab - Shows subscriber tracking with alert buttons
Frontend: Admin Before/After Photos tab - Shows photos view
critical_code_review_comments: All requested APIs working: abs workouts, warmup routines with YouTube videos, reviews CRUD, social links CRUD, inactivity alerts
Admin Panel fully functional with all tabs working
User Progress page shows evolution graphs correctly
108 total workouts including 6 abs workouts (3 FR + 3 EN)
seed_data_creation: Admin user created with VIP subscription for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified. Login works with email/password. Admin has VIP access to all admin tabs. 108 total workouts, 6 abs workouts, 4 routines (warmup/stretching FR/EN). Reviews system working. Social links management working.

features_verified.reviews_page: Leave review and view reviews working
features_verified.my_progress_page: Evolution charts visible (Discipline score, Weekly evolution, Training time)
features_verified.admin_social_media: Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, Facebook links editable
features_verified.admin_coaching: Subscriber tracking with inactivity alert buttons
features_verified.api_warmup_routines: GET /api/routines/warmup returns exercises with YouTube video_url
